sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is normal. Heart rate is 78 bpm. Neurological exam is normal. Hemoglobin A1c level is pending.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has a history of type 2 diabetes and hypertension. The patient's first problem is diabetes. The patient's second problem is hypertension. The patient's blood sugars have been elevated. The patient's first problem is diabetes.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order a hemoglobin A1c test. Order blood sugar checks in the morning every other day. Order a follow-up appointment in two months. Continue lisinopril 10 mg daily. The doctor wants the patient to call them in about two weeks.
